---
title: "Project"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="projects-page-container">

    <!-- ── Header ── -->
    <div class="projects-header">
        <div class="projects-header-title">Project</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Pill Filter Tabs (hidden when only one project) ── -->
    <!-- <div class="projects-filter-tabs">
        <button class="projects-filter-btn active" onclick="showProject('health', event)">慢性腎臟病預測</button>
    </div> -->

    <!-- ── Project View ── -->
    <div class="project-view-container">

        <!-- Project 1: Health Prediction App -->
        <div id="project-health" class="project-fullscreen active">
            <div class="project-hero-image">
                <img src="assets/專案_cover.jpg" alt="健康預測應用">
                <!-- Static tint overlay: sits above img but below hover glass & info button -->
                <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.18);border-radius:inherit;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;"></div>

                <button class="info-toggle-btn" onclick="openProjectInfo(this)" onmouseenter="openProjectInfo(this)" aria-label="Show Info">
                    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12.01" y2="8"></line></svg>
                    <span class="info-tooltip">查看更多</span>
                </button>

                <div class="glass-overlay-canvas" onmouseleave="closeProjectInfo(this)">
                    <div class="overlay-content-wrapper">
                        <div class="project-fullscreen-desc">
                            <h3>慢性腎臟病風險預測模型</h3>
                            <p>和同學組隊參與 AZ 商業競賽，以衛福部國民健康署的台灣地區國民健康調查資料作為訓練集，透過機器學習模型預測慢性腎臟病的患病風險，並以 Streamlit 建構互動式介面。</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="project-tech-large">
                            <span>Python</span>
                            <span>Pandas</span>
                            <span>Scikit-learn</span>
                            <span>Streamlit</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <a href="https://healthapp-pdtuzjihfbyfahxpr3yek6.streamlit.app/" class="view-live-btn" target="_blank">View Live <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg></a>
            </div>
        </div>

    </div>
</div>

<script>
function showProject(projectId, event) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.projects-filter-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');

    document.querySelectorAll('.project-fullscreen').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.remove('active');
        el.style.display = 'none';
        const overlay = el.querySelector('.glass-overlay-canvas');
        if(overlay) overlay.classList.remove('active');
    });

    const target = document.getElementById('project-' + projectId);
    target.style.display = 'flex';
    target.classList.add('active');
}

function openProjectInfo(btn) {
    const heroImage = btn.closest('.project-hero-image');
    const overlay = heroImage.querySelector('.glass-overlay-canvas');
    if(overlay && !overlay.classList.contains('active')) {
        overlay.classList.add('active');
    }
}

function closeProjectInfo(btn) {
    const overlay = btn.closest('.glass-overlay-canvas');
    if(overlay) overlay.classList.remove('active');
}
</script>
```
